name: Rejection Analysis
query:
SELECT 
    qi.name AS "Inspection:Link/Quality Inspection:120",
    qi.reference_name AS "Reference:Data:120",
    qi.item_code AS "Item:Link/Item:120",
    qi.custom_batch_qty AS "Batch Qty:Int:80",
    qi.custom_total_rejected_qty AS "Rejected Qty:Int:80",
    qi.custom_accepted_qty AS "Accepted Qty:Int:80",
    qi.custom_machine AS "Machine:Link/Workstation:120",
    qi.custom_job_card AS "Job Card:Link/Job Card:120",
    qi.custom_process_rejected_in AS "Process Caused:Link/Operation:120",
    qi.custom_process_identified_in AS "Process Found:Link/Operation:120",
    qi.custom_issue_description AS "Issue Description:Small Text:200",
    qi.custom_disposition AS "Disposition:Data:100",
    qi.custom_capa_status AS "CAPA Status:Data:100",
    qi.inspection_date AS "Date:Date:100"
FROM 
    `tabQuality Inspection` qi
WHERE 
    qi.status = "Rejected" OR qi.custom_disposition IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    qi.inspection_date DESC

name: Workers Efficiency Report
query:
SELECT 
    jc.name AS "Job Card:Link/Job Card:120",
    jc.workstation AS "Workstation:Link/Workstation:120",
    jc.employee AS "Employee:Link/Employee:150",
    jc.custom_shift AS "Shift:Data:80",
    jc.custom_standard_cycle_time AS "Std Cycle Time:Float:120",
    jc.custom_total_downtime AS "Total Downtime:Float:120",
    jc.custom_total_working_time AS "Total Working Time:Float:150",
    jc.custom_machine_utilization_pct AS "Machine Util %:Percent:120",
    jc.custom_operator_efficiency_pct AS "Operator Eff %:Percent:120"
FROM 
    `tabJob Card` jc
ORDER BY 
    jc.creation DESC

name: Raw Material Yield Report
query:
SELECT 
    wo.name AS "Work Order:Link/Work Order:120",
    wo.production_item AS "Item:Link/Item:120",
    wo.custom_rm_grade AS "RM Grade:Data:100",
    wo.custom_total_weight AS "Total Weight (Kg):Float:120",
    wo.custom_scrap_weight AS "Scrap Weight (Kg):Float:120",
    wo.custom_rm_yield_pct AS "RM Yield %:Percent:100"
FROM 
    `tabWork Order` wo
ORDER BY 
    wo.creation DESC

name: Daily Production vs Plan
query:
SELECT 
    wo.name AS "Work Order:Link/Work Order:120",
    wo.production_item AS "Item:Link/Item:120",
    wo.custom_daily_plan AS "Daily Plan Qty:Int:120",
    wo.produced_qty AS "Actual Produced Qty:Float:150",
    (wo.produced_qty - wo.custom_daily_plan) AS "Variance:Float:100"
FROM 
    `tabWork Order` wo
ORDER BY 
    wo.creation DESC

name: Rejection Pareto Chart
query:
SELECT 
    qi.custom_issue_description AS "Issue:Data:200",
    COUNT(qi.name) AS "Count:Int:100"
FROM 
    `tabQuality Inspection` qi
WHERE 
    qi.custom_issue_description IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    qi.custom_issue_description
ORDER BY 
    Count DESC

name: Production Monitoring Dashboard
query:
SELECT 
    wo.name AS "Work Order:Link/Work Order:120",
    wo.production_item AS "Item:Link/Item:120",
    wo.qty AS "Planned Qty:Float:100",
    wo.produced_qty AS "Produced Qty:Float:100",
    wo.custom_rm_heat_no AS "RM Heat No:Data:120",
    wo.custom_rm_grade AS "RM Grade:Data:100",
    wo.status AS "WO Status:Data:100",
    wo.production_plan AS "Production Plan:Link/Production Plan:120",
    wo.sales_order AS "Sales Order:Link/Sales Order:120"
FROM 
    `tabWork Order` wo
ORDER BY 
    wo.creation DESC

name: Outsourcing Lead Time Report
query:
SELECT 
    dn.name AS "DC No:Link/Delivery Note:150",
    dn.custom_dc_type AS "DC Type:Data:100",
    dn.custom_dc_process AS "Process:Data:120",
    dn.customer AS "Customer:Link/Customer:120",
    dn.posting_date AS "Date:Date:100",
    dni.item_code AS "Item:Link/Item:120",
    dni.qty AS "Qty:Float:100"
FROM 
    `tabDelivery Note` dn
LEFT JOIN
    `tabDelivery Note Item` dni ON dni.parent = dn.name
WHERE
    dn.custom_dc_type IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY 
    dn.creation DESC

name: Rejection Reason Breakdown
query:
SELECT 
    rr.reason_name AS "Rejection Reason:Data:200",
    rr.reason_category AS "Category:Data:120",
    SUM(rd.rejected_qty) AS "Total Rejected:Int:100",
    COUNT(DISTINCT rd.parent) AS "Inspections:Int:80"
FROM 
    `tabTooltech Rejection Detail` rd
JOIN 
    `tabTooltech Rejection Reason` rr ON rr.name = rd.rejection_reason
GROUP BY 
    rr.name
ORDER BY 
    SUM(rd.rejected_qty) DESC

name: CAPA Tracker
query:
SELECT
    qi.name AS "Inspection:Link/Quality Inspection:120",
    qi.item_code AS "Item:Link/Item:120",
    qi.custom_root_cause AS "Root Cause:Small Text:200",
    qi.custom_corrective_action AS "Corrective Action:Small Text:200",
    qi.custom_preventive_action AS "Preventive Action:Small Text:200",
    qi.custom_capa_due_date AS "Due Date:Date:100",
    qi.custom_capa_status AS "Status:Data:100",
    qi.custom_responsible_person AS "Responsible:Link/Employee:120"
FROM
    `tabQuality Inspection` qi
WHERE
    qi.custom_capa_status IN ("Open", "In Progress")
ORDER BY
    qi.custom_capa_due_date ASC
